source_description:
replace 'kasmos' with no args as a new tui view that allows you to browse available feature specs, create a new one (w/ planning and task generation flow), or start implementation waves/continuous on one with WPs ready to go. the current cli output still stays the same you just get that help view with --help now. the existing tui linked to kasmos start should be able to open that view in a new tab.

if started with just 'kasmos' that tui launches new tabs for whatever actions are needed (new pane for feature spec generation flow)
